definition: Systematic tabulation of 25 countries' pronatalist policy outcomes showing 0/25 recovered to replacement-level fertility. The most successful cases achieved only partial, often temporary, increases before plateauing or declining again.
evidence: 25-country systematic tabulation with zero recoveries to 2.1 TFR
France: most sustained pronatalist policy, now declining from ~1.9 to ~1.68
South Korea: $200B+ spent, TFR continued falling to 0.72
open_questions: Are there emerging pronatalist policy designs not yet captured in the dataset?
